prompt: Can updating Dell Firmware 'unlock' BIOS booting?
evidence: The firmware shows that the Legacy boot mode is not selectable (greyed-out) for some reason: I suspect that it was somehow configured this way by the previous owner. I have identical machines: it is possible to choose between the legacy & UEFI : one of the two must be selected. The goal is to enable said Dell Optiplex 7010 to boot via BIOS. I have traversed the Dell firmware boot menus and have not seen an option to enable BIOS. If I simply missed this any guidance (steps) to navigate is appreciated. QUESTIONS At this point, I have only been able to install Ubuntu to the PC: Dell Boot Firmware If this posting belongs in another forum please migrate to the appropriate venue
